global_description: A medium-sized bird with a rounded body and a distinctive green tail. It has a gray head with a striking rufous crown, olive-green upperparts, and a white throat. The bird's underparts are pale with a hint of buff, and its wings are a mix of green and brown.

part_details.head: Gray with a prominent rufous crown and white throat.
part_details.tail: Long and green, contrasting with the body.
part_details.wings: Green and brown, matching the upperparts.

spatial_relations: The rufous crown is on top of the gray head.
The green tail extends from the rear of the body.
The white throat is below the gray head.
The olive-green upperparts cover the back and wings.
